metadata.program: European Cooperation in Science and Technology (COST)

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project will contribute to the activities of COST Action CA23141 - MAIA - in the areas related to exploring advanced deep learning models in diverse archaeological contexts, managing relevant training and evaluation data collections, analysing existing and newly created digital comparative collections, and investigating robustness and transparency of learning approaches in archaeology.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Smrz Pavel, doc. RNDr., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader
